response.justification: Seasoned senior/staff full-stack engineer with 12+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and strong TypeScript/Node.js and AWS experience, plus recent exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure. However, the core GenAI requirements are thin: no demonstrated RAG or vector database work, no Python in the skill set, and AI involvement reads as recent and peripheral rather than 8+ years of production AI delivery. Customer-facing technical leadership is implied through teaching and mentoring but not shown in an enterprise delivery context. A screening call could clarify the depth and recency of the AI/agentic work before committing.
strengths: Deep, long-tenured engineering background with strong TypeScript/Node.js and AWS CDK production experience
Recent hands-on work with MCP and agentic workflow frameworks aligns with key technologies
Demonstrated technical leadership through mentoring, workshops, and open-source platform ownership
concerns: No evidence of RAG architectures or vector databases, both required qualifications
Python absent from skills; AI/GenAI experience appears recent and not the required 8+ years
Customer-facing discovery/leadership in enterprise delivery not clearly demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Limited depth/recency of production AI experience
